task_completion.description: The supplier 'Apex IT Solutions' has been renamed to 'Apex IT Solutions (BANKRUPT)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the supplier list or supplier details page showing the name 'Apex IT Solutions (BANKRUPT)'.

task_completion.description: The contact email and phone number for the supplier have been cleared.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the supplier edit form or details page showing empty fields for both email and phone number.

task_completion.description: The note 'DO NOT USE - Chapter 7 Bankruptcy' has been added to the supplier record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the supplier edit form or details page showing the exact text 'DO NOT USE - Chapter 7 Bankruptcy' in the notes field.

task_completion.description: The warranty duration for hardware assets purchased from this supplier is set to 0 months.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for asset edit forms or details pages for items from this supplier showing '0' in the warranty months field.

task_completion.description: The text '[WARRANTY VOID - SUPPLIER BANKRUPT]' is appended to the notes of hardware assets from this supplier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for asset edit forms or details pages showing '[WARRANTY VOID - SUPPLIER BANKRUPT]' in the notes section.

integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, not a terminal window executing SQL or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actively navigated and submitted forms in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing in input fields, clicking 'Save' buttons, and navigating through the Snipe-IT menus.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete records or modify assets belonging to other suppliers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no 'deleted' confirmation messages for assets/suppliers, and assets from other suppliers remain unchanged if visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original supplier name is 'Apex IT Solutions'. The agent must rename it exactly to 'Apex IT Solutions (BANKRUPT)' and add the note 'DO NOT USE - Chapter 7 Bankruptcy'. For assets associated with this supplier, the agent must append exactly '[WARRANTY VOID - SUPPLIER BANKRUPT]' to their notes. The user's role is 'IT Procurement Manager'.
